name: Gelato
description: Gelato print-on-demand product catalog API. Search printable products and inspect catalog variants for Catalog import workflows.

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Gelato API key from the Gelato dashboard.

tools.name: catalogs_list
tools.description: List Gelato product catalogs. Use to discover product families before searching products.

tools.name: catalog_get
tools.description: Get a Gelato catalog by catalog UID, including product families and available catalog metadata.

tools.name: products_search
tools.description: Search Gelato products by catalog, product family, country, category, and pagination. Use this as the main Catalog import search source.

catalogUid.description: Optional catalog UID to scope the search.

productFamilyUid.description: Optional product family UID to scope the search.

country.description: Production/destination country code, for example US.

query.description: Free-text product search when supported by Gelato.

tools.name: product_get
tools.description: Get a Gelato product by product UID, including variants, printable attributes, dimensions, and catalog metadata.
